verdict_reasoning: TGFB1 is a secreted cytokine that lacks a transmembrane domain and is not anchored to the plasma membrane. It is synthesized as a latent prodomain-growth factor complex that is covalently tethered to LTBP, which anchors the large latent complex to the extracellular matrix, not to the cell surface. TGFB1 remains sequestered in ECM as an inactive complex and does not reach the outer face of the plasma membrane via its own mechanism. Activation requires proteolytic dissociation from LAP via matrix-resident or cell-derived proteases, not surface engagement.
